Off Calendar May-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELEXIS ARIAS' Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Eleventh Cause Of Action For Penalties Pursuant To The Private Attorneys General Act

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to dismiss "eleventh cause of action for penalties pursuant to the Private Attorneys General Act" is granted.

A proposed order is lodged for the court's review and signature.
